infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ResqRide needs your location to find nearby service providers and track your active roadside assistance request.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: ResqRide uses your location in the background to share your position with your assigned provider during an active emergency or service request.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ResqRide uses your camera to capture photos of your documents for provider identity verification.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ResqRide accesses your photo library so you can upload identity documents and vehicle photos for provider verification.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: ResqRide may save service-related photos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: ResqRide can read your contacts so you can quickly add emergency contacts for SOS alerts.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ResqRide may use your microphone for voice messages during active service requests.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: ResqRide sends push notifications to keep you updated on your service request status, provider arrival, and important alerts.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: ResqRide needs your location to find nearby mechanics.
